Descriptions.Description: Clutch Ki - RMZ250
Designed to outperform any OEM or aftermarket clutch
DPK kits include friction plates, steel drive plates and clutch springs, except when OEM clutch includes reusable diaphragm spring
DPK clutch kits come in a foam-lined hard plastic case that protects clutch components from being damaged prior to installation
Case can be used to store and transport parts, tools or other items after clutch is installed
Come ready to race - no need to presoak plates in oil
Designed to ensure ultrasmooth power delivery
Exclusive high-heat friction materials for fade-free performance
Friction compounds designed to suit off-road and dual-sport bikes
More durable than OEM plates
Steel Drive Plates
Steel plates won't expand, do not fade or promote clutch swell like stock aluminum plates
Long lasting - up to 300% more life than stock plates
Increased weight over stock plates adds flywheel effect for aiding starting and traction
Will not muddy or contaminate oil
Clutch Springs
Precision-wound using the finest chrome silicone wire
Heat-treated and shot-peened for maximum life
Individually designed to ensure no slippage with super-strong spring rates
Improve feel and ease of clutch operation
Standard Brake Pads - BMW
Quick break-in period so you get peak braking performance fast
Design and materials ensure consistent, hard stops and fade-free performance
Gray-colored aluminum oxide-based ceramic material on backplate keeps heat away from caliper piston
Excellent initial bite and feel in both wet and dry conditions
Sintered metal compounds outlast conventional organic or aramid pads
GG friction rated
Quiet and non-abusive to most rotors; no brake dust or brake fade

Sintered Brake Pads - Kawasaki
DP Brakes Brake Pads are designed with sintered metal compounds to give your ATV high-tech performance in all conditions
Pads have a quick break-in period so you get maximum performance fast
DP Brakes design and materials ensure consistent, hard stops and fade-free performance
Sintered metal compounds outlast more conventional organic or aramid fiber pads
Use DP Brakes Rotors in conjunction with DP Brakes Brake Pads for the ultimate in braking performance
GG-friction rated and made with DP Brakes' proven sintered-metal material
Gray-colored aluminum oxide-based ceramic material on rear of back plate keeps heat away from caliper piston and fluid in extreme conditions for fade-free performance
Pad compound gives equal performance in wet or dry conditions
The ideal replacement pad where durability is the prime requirement
Bright, attractive pegboard packaging

Sintered Metal Brake Pads - Buell
Feature the industry-high, HH+ friction rating
Provide superior stopping power with no mileage penalty
Gray-colored aluminum oxide-based ceramic material on backplate of pad keeps heat away from caliper piston and fluid in extreme conditions for fade free performance

Brake Pads - Buell
Developed with the aid of top works teams to perform at the World Superbike level, where an HH friction rating is required
Cream-colored, state-of-the-art zirconium based ceramic material on rear of backing plate works as heat shield in high-stress conditions to keep heat away from caliper piston and fluid
Designed to give maximum initial power, with fingertip control throughout the stop
Fade free even in the harshest conditions
Not for use with HHI calipers.
RDP Race pads are for race/track use only; not for street use. Any other use could result in death or serious injury.

Give improved feel, performance and stopping power

Caliper Piston - Honda
Eliminates brake fade & drag
Reduces temperature
Castellated and drilled for maximum ventilation
Chamfered to reduce the contact patch with the head source (pad)
Diamond burnished and nitron mc coated for a super smooth low friction surface
Internal radial cooling fins to increase the surface area and to maximize heat
Radiused rear cavity to increase the surface area and provide more fluid behind the piston

Clutch Kit - CRF230
Designed to outperform any OEM or aftermarket clutch
DPK kits include friction plates, steel drive plates and clutch springs, except when OEM clutch includes reusable diaphragm spring
DPK clutch kits come in a foam-lined hard plastic case that protects clutch components from being damaged prior to installation
Case can be used to store and transport parts, tools or other items after clutch is installed
Come ready to race - no need to presoak plates in oil
Designed to ensure ultrasmooth power delivery
Exclusive high-heat friction materials for fade-free performance
Friction compounds designed to suit off-road and dual-sport bikes
More durable than OEM plates
Steel Drive Plates
Steel plates won't expand, do not fade or promote clutch swell like stock aluminum plates
Long lasting - up to 300% more life than stock plates
Increased weight over stock plates adds flywheel effect for aiding starting and traction
Will not muddy or contaminate oil
Clutch Springs
Precision-wound using the finest chrome silicone wire
Heat-treated and shot-peened for maximum life
Individually designed to ensure no slippage with super-strong spring rates
Improve feel and ease of clutch operation

Brake Pads
Developed with the aid of top works teams to perform at the World Superbike level, where an HH friction rating is required
Cream-colored, state-of-the-art zirconium based ceramic material on rear of backing plate works as heat shield in high-stress conditions to keep heat away from caliper piston and fluid
Designed to give maximum initial power, with fingertip control throughout the stop
Fade free even in the harshest conditions
Not for use with HHI calipers.
RDP Race pads are for race/track use only; not for street use. Any other use could result in death or serious injury.

Clutch Kit - Honda
Designed to outperform any OEM or aftermarket clutch
DPK kits include friction plates, steel drive plates and clutch springs, except when OEM clutch includes reusable diaphragm spring
DPK clutch kits come in a foam-lined hard plastic case that protects clutch components from being damaged prior to installation
Case can be used to store and transport parts, tools or other items after clutch is installed
Come ready to race - no need to presoak plates in oil
Designed to ensure ultrasmooth power delivery
Exclusive high-heat friction materials for fade-free performance
Friction compounds designed to suit off-road and dual-sport bikes
More durable than OEM plates
Steel Drive Plates
Steel plates won't expand, do not fade or promote clutch swell like stock aluminum plates
Long lasting - up to 300% more life than stock plates
Increased weight over stock plates adds flywheel effect for aiding starting and traction
Will not muddy or contaminate oil
Clutch Springs
Precision-wound using the finest chrome silicone wire
Heat-treated and shot-peened for maximum life
Individually designed to ensure no slippage with super-strong spring rates
Improve feel and ease of clutch operation

Steel Drive Plates
Steel plates won't expand, do not fade or promote clutch swell like stock aluminum plates
Long lasting - up to 300% more life than stock plates
Increased weight over stock plates adds flywheel effect for aiding starting and traction
Will not muddy or contaminate oil
Clutch Springs
Precision-wound using the finest chrome silicone wire
Heat-treated and shot-peened for maximum life
Individually designed to ensure no slippage with super-strong spring rates
Improve feel and ease of clutch operation
Clutch Kit - Arctic Cat/Kawasaki/Suzuki
Designed to outperform any OEM or aftermarket clutch
DPK kits include friction plates, steel drive plates and clutch springs, except when OEM clutch includes reusable diaphragm spring
DPK clutch kits come in a foam-lined hard plastic case that protects clutch components from being damaged prior to installation
Case can be used to store and transport parts, tools or other items after clutch is installed

Designed to outperform any OEM or aftermarket clutch

Clutch Kit - Kawasaki/Suzuki
Designed to outperform any OEM or aftermarket clutch
DPK kits include friction plates, steel drive plates and clutch springs, except when OEM clutch includes reusable diaphragm spring
DPK clutch kits come in a foam-lined hard plastic case that protects clutch components from being damaged prior to installation
Case can be used to store and transport parts, tools or other items after clutch is installed
Come ready to race - no need to presoak plates in oil
Designed to ensure ultrasmooth power delivery
Exclusive high-heat friction materials for fade-free performance
Friction compounds designed to suit off-road and dual-sport bikes
More durable than OEM plates
Steel Drive Plates
Steel plates won't expand, do not fade or promote clutch swell like stock aluminum plates
Long lasting - up to 300% more life than stock plates
Increased weight over stock plates adds flywheel effect for aiding starting and traction
Will not muddy or contaminate oil
Clutch Springs
Precision-wound using the finest chrome silicone wire
Heat-treated and shot-peened for maximum life
Individually designed to ensure no slippage with super-strong spring rates
Improve feel and ease of clutch operation

Clutch Kit - CRF250R
Designed to outperform any OEM or aftermarket clutch
DPK kits include friction plates, steel drive plates and clutch springs, except when OEM clutch includes reusable diaphragm spring
DPK clutch kits come in a foam-lined hard plastic case that protects clutch components from being damaged prior to installation
Case can be used to store and transport parts, tools or other items after clutch is installed
Come ready to race - no need to presoak plates in oil
Designed to ensure ultrasmooth power delivery
Exclusive high-heat friction materials for fade-free performance
Friction compounds designed to suit off-road and dual-sport bikes
More durable than OEM plates
Steel Drive Plates
Steel plates won't expand, do not fade or promote clutch swell like stock aluminum plates
Long lasting - up to 300% more life than stock plates
Increased weight over stock plates adds flywheel effect for aiding starting and traction
Will not muddy or contaminate oil
Clutch Springs
Precision-wound using the finest chrome silicone wire
Heat-treated and shot-peened for maximum life
Individually designed to ensure no slippage with super-strong spring rates
Improve feel and ease of clutch operation
Clutch Fibers - Twin Cam
Specifically designed to provide extended clutch life, fade- and slip-free operation and superior shifting
Friction plates have DP Brake's exclusive high-heat friction materials for fade-free performance
More durable than OEM plates
Long lasting - up to 300% more life than stock plates
Will not muddy or contaminate oil
